reason: Browser use feature successfully executed browser navigation and page title retrieval commands, with agent correctly identifying "Example Domain" as the page title from https://example.com
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260507-211528-0zgt" in sidebar — Agent view opened showing chat interface and configuration panels
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into input field — Message entered correctly and send button became enabled
Clicked send button — Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to working state showing "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" session
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent executed two tool calls: "Open Browser" (completed successfully) and "Browser Command $ get title" (completed successfully)
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response displays "The page title is "Example Domain"." with browser preview showing the actual Example Domain webpage on the right panel
